items.title: South East Water boss quits after supply failures
items.summary: David Hinton faced criticism after outages affected tens of thousands of people in Kent and Sussex.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: U.A.E. Expels Pakistani Workers, as Pakistan’s Peacemaking Creates a Rift
items.summary: As Pakistan mediates between the U.S. and Iran, its ties to the Emirates have deteriorated. Pakistani workers say they are now being sent home en masse.

items.title: David Attenborough celebrates his 100th birthday
items.summary: He was born before the Great Depression, came of age in WWII, and is still making wildlife documentaries. Brits call David Attenborough a national hero, as he celebrates his 100...
